code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = x % y
    x = y
    y = t
  end
  x
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    let a_start = i
    while i < n and not is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    let a_end = i
    while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    let b_start = i
    while i < n and not is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    let b_end = i
    let a_str = string.substring(line, a_start, a_end)
    let b_str = string.substring(line, b_start, b_end)
    match string.parse_int(a_str)
    when Some(a)
      match string.parse_int(b_str)
      when Some(b)
        println("gcd=#{gcd(a, b)}")
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
